pr.title: Add fingerprint/apostille/FBI business model + apostille workflow engine + Obsidian SOPs
pr.body:
## Summary

Full business management system for fingerprinting, apostilles, and FBI background checks — modeled after [Metroprints](https://www.metroprints.co/apostille). Includes a **workflow engine** with state machine transitions, **auto-pricing**, **pipeline view**, and **Obsidian-compatible SOP documentation**.

**All fingerprinting services are in-office only. Apostilles are handled online.**

### Business Domain Model (5 entities, 25+ CRUD endpoints)

| Entity | Purpose |
|---|---|
| **Services** | Catalog across 3 categories: `fingerprint`, `apostille`, `fbi` with pricing |
| **Clients** | Customer profiles with ID verification tracking |
| **Appointments** | In-office fingerprinting scheduling ($99), status tracking |
| **Orders** | Full lifecycle: received → processing → submitted_to_agency → completed → shipped |
| **Documents** | Document tracking with apostille status pipeline |

### Apostille Workflow Engine (`/api/apostille/`)

| Endpoint | Auth | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `GET /pricing` | Public | Full pricing matrix (state + federal) |
| `POST /quote` | Public | Instant price calculation with breakdown |
| `POST /intake` | Yes | Creates order + documents with auto-pricing |
| `GET /pipeline` | Yes | Orders grouped by status with docs + revenue summary |
| `PATCH /orders/:id/transition` | Yes | State machine (prevents invalid status jumps) |
| `PATCH /documents/:id/transition` | Yes | Apostille lifecycle (pending → submitted → apostilled) |

**State Machine — prevents invalid transitions:**
```
received → processing → submitted_to_agency → completed → shipped
     ↘         ↘              ↘
    rejected  rejected      rejected  →  received (resubmission)
```

**Pricing Engine:**
- State apostille: $200/doc, +$200 priority, +$100 expedited mail
- Federal apostille: $200/doc, +$200 priority, +$200 intl mail, +$50 additional docs
- In-office fingerprinting: $99

### Obsidian SOP Documentation (`docs/obsidian/`)

6 interlinked Obsidian-compatible markdown notes with YAML frontmatter and `[[wikilinks]]`:
- **SOP-Apostille-Workflow.md** — Step-by-step process with workflow diagram
- **Apostille-Pricing.md** — Price matrix, common scenarios, API usage
- **Service-Catalog.md** — All services (in-office fingerprinting, online apostilles, FBI checks)
- **Client-Intake-Checklist.md** — Pre-order checklist for staff
- **Agent-Automations.md** — 5 AI agents + 15 automations to reduce manual steps
- **API-Reference.md** — Apostille workflow endpoint documentation

### Agent & Automation Opportunities

| Agent | Purpose | Steps Eliminated |
|---|---|---|
| Intake Agent | Auto-guides clients through doc selection + pricing | Manual back-and-forth |
| Document Verification Agent | AI-powered OCR + type validation | Manual review |
| Status Notification Agent | Auto emails/SMS at each pipeline stage | Manual client updates |
| Pipeline Monitor Agent | SLA tracking, flags overdue orders | Manual tracking |
| Pricing/Quote Agent | Instant quoting for walk-ins | Manual calculation |

### Other Changes
- Extended search (clients, orders, documents)
- Rate limiter skip in test env
- **110 tests total**, all passing

## Review & Testing Checklist for Human

- [ ] Test apostille intake: `POST /api/apostille/quote` → `POST /api/apostille/intake` → verify auto-pricing
- [ ] Test state machine: try invalid transitions (e.g., received → shipped) and verify 400 rejection
- [ ] Test pipeline view: create orders at different stages, verify `GET /api/apostille/pipeline`
- [ ] Review Obsidian docs in `docs/obsidian/` — open in Obsidian to verify wikilinks
- [ ] Verify no mobile/on-site references remain in the platform

**Recommended test plan:**
1. `npm install && npm test` — all 110 tests should pass
2. `npm run dev` → register → create client → get quote → submit intake → transition lifecycle
3. Open `docs/obsidian/` as an Obsidian vault to browse SOPs

### Notes
- Mobile fingerprinting has been completely removed — all services in-office only
- Apostille services are online (document upload → processing → shipping)
- `docs/obsidian/` can be opened directly as an Obsidian vault or linked from an existing vault
- Notion workspace integration is outlined in Agent-Automations.md as Phase 2

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/8696c93a309d430fbd9e475b49789108
Requested by: @aalikes
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
